_comment_model: MODEL SELECTION (set automatically based on modality):
IMPORTANT: When switching modality, update ALL THREE fields together:
model, modality, AND default_channel. Mismatched values cause eval failures.
_comment_deployed_app_id: deployed_app_id MUST be the short name only (e.g., 'your-app-name').
DO NOT use the full Google Cloud resource path (projects/.../apps/...).
The SDK automatically constructs the full path during push and eval operations.
_comment_gcs_bucket: GCS BUCKET (REQUIRED for audio agents, omit for text):
The platform's evaluationAudioRecordingConfig needs a bucket to record
and store audio eval artifacts. Without it, every audio eval run returns
For text agents, DELETE this field entirely (don't leave as null).
